summary: Tested the new PUBLIC direct-booking + Stripe Checkout feature end-to-end. Backend: 16/17 pytest cases pass (test_public_booking.py). Frontend Playwright flow walks /book → property cards → booking drawer → server-side quote → real Stripe redirect (cs_test_... session created). Regression tests for manager APIs (bookings, ledger, housekeeping, guests, reports, owner statement, rates) all pass.

minor.issue: Returns 200 (nights=1) when check_out < check_in instead of 400. Root cause: nights_between() uses max(1, days) so the `if nights < 1` guard in /public/quote can never fire. Compare with /public/checkout which calls _check_availability and still validates date order indirectly. Recommend computing raw days first; if days<1 raise HTTP 400, then clamp.
Endpoint hides owner_id/owner_name but still exposes other internal fields like cleaning_fee, weekend_nightly, min_nights — acceptable but worth a privacy review.

ui_bugs.issue: fmtMoney truncates cents — total displays as $1,824 while the amount actually charged via Stripe is $1,824.45. Tax line shows $164 vs real 164.45. Customers may notice a discrepancy on the Stripe page. Suggest formatting with 2 decimals.

action_items: Fix /api/public/quote to return HTTP 400 when check_out <= check_in (nights_between clamps to 1, defeating the guard).
Display quote amounts with 2 decimal places so UI total matches Stripe Checkout exactly.
(Optional) prune additional internal property fields from /api/public/properties response.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1060 lines — consider splitting (auth, public, bookings, accounting) into modules for maintainability.
_finalize_payment swallows 409 (dates became unavailable) and just marks txn as needs_review with no automated refund/notification — manual ops follow-up required.

guest lookup by name in _create_booking_record (db.guests.find_one({'name': guest_name})) is brittle — two different guests with the same full name will be merged. Should match by email when available.
/api/public/properties leaks property-level commission-related fields by omission only; safer to explicitly whitelist public fields.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable flow (Stripe redirect verified; hosted card-entry page is outside our automation scope)

test_credentials: Manager: manager@coastline.com / Manager123 (verified working). Stripe test card 4242 4242 4242 4242 for hosted page.
seed_data_creation: Tests use TEST_-prefixed guests and cancel temp bookings on teardown. One paid Stripe test session (cs_test_a1fgEk0N7bUcmqTLQHagvPlsJ7emvPjSoXel...) was created but NOT completed; payment_transactions row remains in 'pending' state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test baseline now includes /app/backend/tests/test_public_booking.py covering public listing, quote, checkout-session creation, idempotent status polling, overlap 409, and manager regression. To verify the post-payment side effects (booking + ledger + housekeeping creation, idempotency under repeated GET /status calls after paid), one needs to complete the Stripe hosted checkout with card 4242 4242 4242 4242 — Playwright cannot easily reach inside Stripe's iframe. Recommend either (a) a manual completion + re-poll, or (b) using the Stripe webhook event simulator to trigger _finalize_payment. Public site UI flow up to Stripe redirect is fully verified working.
rca of the issue: Quote endpoint returns 200 for reversed dates because nights_between() returns max(1, (d2-d1).days). Repro: GET /api/public/quote?property_id=...&check_in=2027-09-15&check_out=2027-09-10 → 200 with nights=1. Fix: in /public/quote compute raw days, if days<1 raise HTTPException(400).
